{{Relic Infobox|Orichalcum???|2}}{{R|Orichalcum???||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Event|Event|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}} from the [[Slay the Spire 2:Merchant???|Merchant???]]. It is a weaker version of {{R|Orichalcum||2}}.

== Sources ==
Can be bought from the [[Slay the Spire 2:Merchant???|Merchant???]]. Also can be obtained upon defeating the [[Slay the Spire 2:Merchant???|Merchant???]] in combat.

== Interactions ==
* Stacks with {{R|Orichalcum||2}} for 9 total Block.
